ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: _wheat_ flour 33% (with calcium, iron, niacin (b3), thiamin (b1)), wholemeal _wheat_ flour 33%, water, yeast, salt, vegetable oils (rapeseed, sustainable palm), vinegar, sustainable _soya_ flour, emulsifier (e472e), preservative (calcium propionate), flour treatment agent (ascorbic acid (vitamin c)).
